items.title: Sources: The Sacramento Kings will select Meleek Thomas with the No. 34 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Thomas and a 2032 Cavaliers second-round pick are being traded to the Cleveland Cavaliers as part of the Alex Karaban trade.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Sacramento Kings will select Meleek Thomas with the No. 34 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Thomas and a 2032 Cavaliers second-round pick are being traded to the Cleveland Cavaliers as part of the Alex Karaban trade.

items.title: The Cavs and Kings are becoming more acquainted through trades. Their latest transaction sends Alex Karaban, the winningest player in UConn men’s basketball history, to Sacramento.
items.author: Ethan Sands
items.body_excerpt:
The Cavs and Kings are becoming more acquainted through trades. Their latest transaction sends Alex Karaban, the winningest player in UConn men’s basketball history, to Sacramento.

Cleveland is now — currently — set to make a selection on Day 2 of the 2026 NBA Draft. #NBASky

items.title: League source confirms that the Sacramento Kings have traded the 34th pick and a future second round pick for the No. 29 pick where they will select Alex Karaban. Karaban stood out in his visit with the Kings with his shooting and positive approach. Kings got a glue guy.
items.author: James Ham
items.body_excerpt: League source confirms that the Sacramento Kings have traded the 34th pick and a future second round pick for the No. 29 pick where they will select Alex Karaban. Karaban stood out in his visit with the Kings with his shooting and positive approach. Kings got a glue guy.
